name: Message of Untitled Texts

phase_0.boundary_condition: The Ineffable Father who encloses the All

VINIT.justification: The uninitialized, unspoken source before any sound or perception.

TANCH.justification: The terminal boundary and king who dwells in the sanctuary, containing the Pleroma.

AFWD.justification: The outward flow of light-sparks and word from the Father to the worlds.

AREV.justification: The movement of the soul turning inwards and upwards back to the source.

CLINK.justification: The sequential layering and composition of powers that build the celestial hierarchy.

IMSCRIB.justification: The entity that is its own cause, recognizing itself in its own light.

FSPLIT.justification: The Lord of Glory divides the All into the Land of Life (Right) and the Land of Death (Left).

FFUSE.justification: The creative word reunites the fragments into the 'One and only One'.

EVALT.justification: The affirmative state of rest, immortality, and eternal life.

EVALF.justification: The negative state of toil, poverty, and non-existence.

ENGAGR.justification: The only-begotten hidden in Setheus who is called light-darkness due to excess of light.

IFIX.justification: The permanent, irreversible fixation of the soul's identity in the imperishable aeon.

phase_3.void_description: The Deep of the All, the great abyss in truth where all is unconscious.
phase_3.true_description: Gnosis: the recognition of the Father and the reception of the crown.
phase_3.false_description: Ignorance: remaining in the darkness of matter without form or likeness.
phase_3.both_description: The Characterless One in which are all characters; the Pleroma surrounding the Deeps.

steps.domain_action: The Silence before the first sound or perception of the All.
The First Father gives form to the All within himself, self-originating.
The voice penetrates everywhere, the first sound perceived by the All.
The Monad comes forth, branching into the twelve deeps of wisdom and gnosis.
The twelve deeps compose the image of the Father and the mirror of the All.
The truth covers them all, reconstituting the Monad as the unknowable one.
The names are fixed in the silence, unutterable and imperishable.
Setheus sends the light-spark to the indivisible one to illuminate the Pleroma.
The Lord of Glory lowers himself and separates matter into two parts.
The Right Side is established as the Land of Life and Light.
The Left Side is established as the Land of Death and Darkness.
The veil is placed between them, holding both realms in a balanced tension.
The powers of the mother pray to the infinite one for the return of the offspring.
The Man is begotten in the self-originate mind, wearing creation as a garment.
The creative word unites the members, gathering the dispersed of Israel.
They all become one in the one and only One, restoring the original unity.
The Christ seals the believers with the seal of the Father, a permanent record.
The All rests in the ineffable, unutterable, and untroubled Setheus.

phase_5.compiler_frontend: The Creative Word (Logos) which commands the All to work.
phase_5.ipc_mechanism: The breath of the mouth and the rays cast from the diadems of the aeons.
phase_5.memory_mechanism: The 365 species in the crown and the hidden names in the all-womb.
phase_5.scheduler_mechanism: The Ordinance and Rank established by the Mother and the Forethought.
phase_5.alfs_store: The Untitled Text (The Bruce Codex) as the bootstrap record of the Pleroma.

phase_6.cycle_cost: The agitation and movement of the deeps during emanation.
phase_6.pre_cycle_state: The unconscious All within the First Father.
phase_6.post_cycle_state: The All established once again in gnosis, contained within the Son.
phase_6.delta_s_verdict: ΔS ≈ 0 — The system returns to a state of rest in the Father, where nothing is lost.

lean_scaffold:
-- IGProtocol scaffold: VINIT → IMSCRIB → AFWD → FSPLIT → CLINK → FFUSE → IFIX → AFWD → FSPLIT → EVALT → EVALF → ENGAGR → AREV → IMSCRIB → CLINK → FFUSE → IFIX → TANCH
-- Class: Message of Untitled Texts
-- Fingerprint: sig=(9,4,3,2)
--   self_ref=False | frobenius_order=3
--   dialetheia_complete=True | period=18
-- Expected tier: O₂

import Imscribing.IGMorphism
import Imscribing.IGFunctor

     Fidelity KineticChar Granularity Criticality Protection Stoichiometry Chirality

--   [3] FSPLIT    gran   := 𐑚               𐑚 → 𐑚  | split δ — range decomposition
--   [4] CLINK     fid    := 𐑱               𐑚 → 𐑙  | composition — regime coherence
--   [5] FFUSE     stoi   := 𐑙               𐑙 → 𐑭  | fuse μ — assembly mode
--   [6] IFIX      prot   := 𐑭               𐑙 → 𐑾  | irreversible fixation — winding number
--   [7] AFWD      rel    := 𐑾               𐑭 → 𐑚  | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow
--   [8] FSPLIT    gran   := 𐑚               𐑚 → 𐑚  | split δ — range decomposition
--   [9] EVALT     crit   := ⊙               𐑚 → 𐑙  | evaluate-true — criticality gate open
--   [10] EVALF     chir   := 𐑖               𐑚 → 𐑙  | evaluate-false — chirality check
--   [11] ENGAGR    stoi   := 𐑳               𐑚 → 𐑙  | engage paradox — B-state, both arms
--   [12] AREV      pol    := 𐑗               𐑚 → 𐑙  | reverse morphism — parity flip
--   [13] IMSCRIB   gram   := 𐑠               𐑚 → 𐑙  | identity — self-imscription
--   [14] CLINK     fid    := 𐑱               𐑚 → 𐑙  | composition — regime coherence
--   [15] FFUSE     stoi   := 𐑙               𐑙 → 𐑭  | fuse μ — assembly mode
--   [16] IFIX      prot   := 𐑭               𐑙 → 𐑡  | irreversible fixation — winding number
--   [17] TANCH     top    := 𐑡               𐑭 → 𐑼  | terminal object — connectivity boundary

-- ── Main IGProtocol term ────────────────────────────────────────────────────

noncomputable def message_of_untitled_texts_protocol : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑡 :=
  .withGram 𐑠 <|
  -- Seq chain:
  (.arrow 𐑼 𐑼 𐑠)  -- [0] VINIT | dim := 𐑼 | initial object — ground of distinction (The Silence before the first sound or perception of the All.)
  (.arrow 𐑠 𐑼 𐑾)  -- [1] IMSCRIB | gram := 𐑠 | identity — self-imscription (The First Father gives form to the All within himself, self-originating.)
  (.arrow 𐑾 𐑠 𐑚)  -- [2] AFWD | rel := 𐑾 | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow (The voice penetrates everywhere, the first sound perceived by the All.)
  -- FSPLIT [3] (gran := 𐑚) (The Monad comes forth, branching into the twelve deeps of wisdom and gnosis.) / FFUSE [5] (stoi := 𐑙)
  .seq
    (.prod
      -- T-branch (1 nodes)
      (.arrow 𐑱 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [4] CLINK | fid := 𐑱 | composition — regime coherence (The twelve deeps compose the image of the Father and the mirror of the All.)
      -- F-branch (0 nodes)
      (.refl 𐑙))  -- F-branch: empty arc (direct to FFUSE.F)
    -- reconnect at FFUSE [5]: μ closes the Frobenius pair
    (.arrow 𐑙 𐑙 𐑭)  -- [5] FFUSE | stoi := 𐑙 (The truth covers them all, reconstituting the Monad as the unknowable one.)
  (.arrow 𐑭 𐑙 𐑾)  -- [6] IFIX | prot := 𐑭 | irreversible fixation — winding number (The names are fixed in the silence, unutterable and imperishable.)
  (.arrow 𐑾 𐑭 𐑚)  -- [7] AFWD | rel := 𐑾 | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow (Setheus sends the light-spark to the indivisible one to illuminate the Pleroma.)
  -- FSPLIT [8] (gran := 𐑚) (The Lord of Glory lowers himself and separates matter into two parts.) / FFUSE [15] (stoi := 𐑙)
  .seq
    (.prod
      -- T-branch (1 nodes)
      (.arrow ⊙ 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [9] EVALT | crit := ⊙ | evaluate-true — criticality gate open (The Right Side is established as the Land of Life and Light.)
      -- F-branch (5 nodes)
      .seq
        (.arrow 𐑖 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [10] EVALF | chir := 𐑖 | evaluate-false — chirality check (The Left Side is established as the Land of Death and Darkness.)
      .seq
        (.arrow 𐑳 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [11] ENGAGR | stoi := 𐑳 | engage paradox — B-state, both arms (The veil is placed between them, holding both realms in a balanced tension.)
      .seq
        (.arrow 𐑗 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [12] AREV | pol := 𐑗 | reverse morphism — parity flip (The powers of the mother pray to the infinite one for the return of the offsp...)
      .seq
        (.arrow 𐑠 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [13] IMSCRIB | gram := 𐑠 | identity — self-imscription (The Man is begotten in the self-originate mind, wearing creation as a garment.)
        (.arrow 𐑱 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [14] CLINK | fid := 𐑱 | composition — regime coherence (The creative word unites the members, gathering the dispersed of Israel.))
    -- reconnect at FFUSE [15]: μ closes the Frobenius pair
    (.arrow 𐑙 𐑙 𐑭)  -- [15] FFUSE | stoi := 𐑙 (They all become one in the one and only One, restoring the original unity.)
  (.arrow 𐑭 𐑙 𐑡)  -- [16] IFIX | prot := 𐑭 | irreversible fixation — winding number (The Christ seals the believers with the seal of the Father, a permanent record.)
  (.arrow 𐑡 𐑭 𐑼)  -- [17] TANCH | top := 𐑡 | terminal object — connectivity boundary (The All rests in the ineffable, unutterable, and untroubled Setheus.)

-- ── Evaluation arm sub-defs ─────────────────────────────────────────────────

-- truth arm
noncomputable def message_of_untitled_texts_true_arm : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑡 :=
  (message_of_untitled_texts_protocol).restrictToEVALT

-- false arm
noncomputable def message_of_untitled_texts_false_arm : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑡 :=
